producer: qe_runs/{cah6,lah10,yh9}@ubu-1:aiden (QE 7.5 conda-forge · pw.x scf + ph.x electron_phonon='simple')
method: Per-candidate small-cell DFT electron-phonon baseline. Pool:ubu-1 6c via mpirun -np 6. pw.x SCF (PSL 1.0.0 pseudopotentials) -> ph.x DFPT (4x4x4-q) -> per-mode lambda · electron_phonon='simple' (per-q lambda in ph.out · BZ-sum offline). Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 / 0.13.

candidates.name: LaH10
candidates.scf_in: ibrav=2 · celldm=9.637 bohr · ecut 70/700 Ry · k=12x12x12
candidates.defer_reason: H32-cage fractional coordinates in Fm-3m primitive cell were written from-memory; need lit-verified import (Materials Project mp-1018134 or Liu 2017 SI · Drozdov 2019 SI) before kickoff — wrong H positions would give imaginary phonons / unphysical lambda

candidates.name: CaH6
candidates.queue_watcher: ~/qe_runs/cah6/run_ph_queued.sh PID 506472 (setsid+nohup detached) waits for concurrent ph.x to clear then launches
candidates.concurrent_other_track: H3Se ph.x (sibling agent · ~6/8 q-pts done · ETA 1-2h)

candidates.name: YH6
candidates.swap_note: swapped from brief's YH9 P63/mmc 20-atom hex (out-of-budget) to YH6 Im-3m 7-atom primitive (same family · also measured: Troyan 2021 224K @ 166 GPa)
candidates.scf_in: ibrav=3 · celldm=6.530 bohr · ecut 60/600 Ry · k=16x16x16
candidates.defer_reason: H6-cage Wyckoff positions in primitive Im-3m cell written from-memory; need lit-verified import before kickoff (same risk class as LaH10)

honest_4_layer_disclosure_D_d7.pressure_regime: all targets 150-210 GPa DAC · gate-(c) ambient FAIL · device-incompatible (per §8.9). Extension = breakthrough-path direction validation · NOT RTSC absorbed=true claim.
honest_4_layer_disclosure_D_d7.convergence_floor: 4x4x4-q is below H3S known under-convergence floor (lambda 1.3 -> 6^3-q 2.3). Extracted values (when ph.x completes) = honest under-converged baseline.
honest_4_layer_disclosure_D_d7.ml_wall_context: ALIGNN ambient ML under-predicts all 4 hydrides >=97% (H3S 92.3% · LaH10 99.3% · CaH6 99.5% · YH6 99.9%). DFT capturing direction (lambda rise) adds 4th confirmation that ambient-trained ML cannot extrapolate high-P el-ph.
honest_4_layer_disclosure_D_d7.what_would_elevate: (i) CaH6 ph.x completion -> lambda extracted -> §9.12.A table populated; (ii) LaH10/YH6 CIF imports from MP/COD -> DEFER cleared; (iii) 24x24x24-k 6x6x6-q ladder (H3S-grade) -> multi-session budget.

follow_on_pickup_checklist: If done: copy ~/rtsc_dft/parse_elph_tc.py and adapt to ~/qe_runs/cah6/ph.out to extract (lambda, omega_log, Tc_AD)
For LaH10/YH6: import published CIF -> replace ATOMIC_POSITIONS -> kick scf -> ph.x
ubu_1_session_lessons: ph.x &inputph does NOT accept pseudo_dir (only &control of pw.x). Remove it from ph.in.
ph.x with electron_phonon='simple' REQUIRES fildvscf= setting (else 'El-ph needs a DeltaVscf file').
Bare 'nohup cmd &' from ssh DIES on session close. Use 'setsid nohup bash script.sh > out.log 2>&1 < /dev/null &' for persistent detachment.
Concurrent ph.x on 6c machine: queue via watcher (poll-pgrep), do NOT launch second ph.x in parallel (oversubscription kills both).
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. DFT prediction (Tier-1) · NOT measurement-oracle. Pattern 2 honored (DAC-pressure means RTSC absorbed=true blocked by gate-(c) until ambient-pressure superhydride frontier · NEVER concede impossible · arxiv:2310.07562 · 2403.13496).
citations: Errea 2016 Nature 532:81 (H3S anharmonicity reference for convergence ladder)
QE 7.5 conda-forge build · ph.x DFPT electron_phonon='simple'
